growth_records.cite: Weiss, Anna S. et al. In vitro interaction network of a synthetic gut bacterial community. The ISME Journal (2022). DOI:10.1038/s41396-021-01153-z. [PMC8941000]
growth_records.snippet: intermediate growth rate (GR > 1 h-1, ... L.reuteri I49) ... lactate production was confirmed for ... L. reuteri I49, all of which harbor the pathway for lactate formation.
growth_records.notes: growth_rate 1.0 h-1 = lower bound of 'intermediate' bin (exact in Table S2, unavailable). Lactate producer (qualitative, MS; gapseq lactate pathway present). No numeric rates.
